sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52676" key="kallilampe/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καλλι-λαμπέτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n52676.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">beautifully shining</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Ἥλιος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0237.tlg001:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
